metadata.name: Add a New Spare Part to the System

description: A new type of sensor will be used on several machines. It needs to be added to the spare parts inventory system.

nodes.task_description: Create a new part number record in the inventory system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully creates a new item master record.

nodes.task_description: Enter details for the part, such as description, primary supplier, cost, and reorder point.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent populates all required fields for the new part.

nodes.task_description: Save the new part record and confirm it is now searchable in the system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent saves the record and successfully finds it using the search function.
